{{Missing Info|specifics=This page is being formatted by the wiki team. Thank you for your patience as we find the best page structure. Reach out to us on Discord to help!}}

__forcetoc__

==Legend==
{|class=wikitable
!Type
!Color Assignment
|-
|Event
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|
|-
|Snail Battle
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|
|-
|Reward
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|
|-
|Mine Pit
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|
|}

==Tiles==
{| class="wikitable"
!Tile
!Name (before Troop Battle)
!Name (after Troop Battle)
!Troop RUSH required Power
!Notes
!Reward
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|1
|Sign
|
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|2
|Watchtower
|
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|3
|Grilled Snail
|
|
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|Rocket Up Blueprint}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|4h Soul Red|red}} (Soul of Traveler 0678)<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Escargot, +1}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|4
|Guard
|Snail's Remains
|320,000
|Add firewood, it requires {{RewardIconWithText|Wood, 1000}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|T1 Pawson Fang, +4}}, <br>afterwards {{RewardIconWithLink|Super Memetic Chest, +5}},<br> {{RewardIcon|4h Soul Red}}<span style="color:#f66;">Soul of Traveler 1179</span>,<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Escargot, +1}}
|-
|5
|Guard Captain
|
|330,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T1 Pawson Core, +4}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|6
|Guard
|Safe Box on Airship
|340,000
|{{RewardIconWithText|Password Note}} is 2117
|{{RewardIconWithText|T1 Pawson Whisker, +4}},<br> afterwards {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +3}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Beast Moon, +1}}
|-
|7
|Guard Captain
|
|350,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T1 Pawson Fang, +4}}
|-
|8
|Supply Convoy
|
|260,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T1 Pawson Whsiker, +3}}
|-
|9
|Supply Convoy
|
|270,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T1 Pawson Fang, +3}}
|-
|10
|Guard
|
|280,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T1 Pawson Core, +3}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|11
|Laborer
|Storage Room
|290,000
|After the troop battle, take the supplies
|{{RewardIconWithText|T1 Pawson Core, +3}},<br> afterwards {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply, +50|yellow}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +30k}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|12
|Wolf General
|Hitman Cadet's Backback
|360,000
|ATK 12,012; DEF 7,714; HP 93,011; RUSH requires AFFCT 29,500
|{{RewardIconWithText|T1 Pawson Core, +5}}<br>after invidual battle: {{RewardIcon|4h Soul Green}}Soul of Wolf General,<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest, +100}}; <br>afterwards display relic {{RewardIconWithLink|Hitman No. 8 License|green}} for a {{RewardIconWithText|Beast Moon, +1}}
|-
|13
|Gun Squad I Hitman
|
|430,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T1 Pawson Whisker, +5}}
|-
|14
|TNT Squad I Hitman
|
|370,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T1 Pawson Fang, +5}}
|-
|15
|TNT Squad II Hitman
|
|380,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T1 Pawson Core, +5}}
|-
|16
|Gun Squad II Hitman
|
|390,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T1 Pawson Whisker, +5}}
|-
|17
|Gun Squad III Hitman
|
|400,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T1 Pawson Fang, +5}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|18
|TNT Squad III Hitman
|Strange Boy
|420,000
|Defeating Hitman unlocks Strange Boy (Shop)
|{{RewardIconWithText|T1 Pawson Core, +5}},<br>Shop: <br>{{RewardIconWithText|Beast Moon}} costs {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, 50k}}, <br>{{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +100}} costs {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, 25k}}, <br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Organ Chest, +100}} costs {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, 40k}} 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|19
|Laborer
|Mine Pit
|410,000
|Mining takes 10 hours to give rewards; requires 20 T1+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Whisker, +6|blue}};<br> After mining: <br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Organ Chest, +150}},<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Super Memetic Chest, +100}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Missile Box, +1}}
|-
|20
|Biochem Operator
|
|450,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Whisker, +5|green}}
|-
|21
|Biochem Operator
|
|460,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Fang, +5|green}}
|-
|22
|Biochem Operator
|
|470,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Core, +5|green}}
|-
|23
|Alpaca General
|Central Lab
|480,000
|Submit in total of 300 {{RewardIcon|Organ Slime}}Organ Slime for three random [[Organs|Organ]]:<br> 1st submission is {{RewardIcon|Organ Slime}}50 for a {{Retext|blue organ|blue}},<br> 2nd submission is {{RewardIcon|Organ Slime}}100 for a {{Retext|purple organ|purple}},<br> 3rd submission is {{RewardIcon|Organ Slime}}150 for an {{Retext|orange organ|orange}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Whisker, +5|green}};<br>(For example:{{RewardIconWithLink|Salamander's Tail, +1|blue}}, {{RewardIconWithLink|Mutated Tentacle, +1|purple}}, {{RewardIconWithLink|Savant Eye, +1|orange}})
|-
|24
|Biochem Operator
|
|520,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Fang, +5|green}}
|-
|25
|Biochem Operator
|
|530,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Core, +5|green}}
|-
|26
|Biochem Operator
|
|490,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Whisker, +5|green}}
|-
|27
|Biochem Operator
|
|500,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Fang, +5|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|28
|Biochem Operator
|Hungry Monster
|510,000
|Needs 30 [[Consumables#Food|Escargot]]
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Core, +5|green}};<br>afterwards {{RewardIconWithLink|Nuclear Waste Barrel|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|29
|Laborer
|Mine Pit
|440,000
|Mining takes 2 hours to give rewards; requires 20 T1+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Whisker, +6|blue}}; <br>after mining:<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Koryeon Treasure Map, +120}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +2}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Missile Box, +1}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|30
|Laborer
|Mine Pit
|540,000
|Mining takes 2h to give rewards; requires 20 T1+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Fang, +6|blue}}; <br>after mining:<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Time Chest, +120}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Missile Box, +1}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Beast Moon, +1}}
|-
|31
|Marine
|
|550,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Whisker, +7|green}}
|-
|32
|Marine
|
|560,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Fang, +7|green}}
|-
|33
|Marine
|
|570,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Whisker, +7|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|34
|Marine
|Sign
|580,000
|Split the sign to get rewards
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Fang, +7|green}};<br> afterwards {{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +500}}
|-
|35
|Rumbo
|Mysterious Telephone
|590,000
|Make a call to get lore
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Core, +5|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|36
|Croc General
|Wish Pond
|600,000
|Croc General: ATK 14,968, DEF 9,612, HP 146,323, RUSH requires AFFCT 33,300<br>After individual battle:<br> Wish Pond requires 1 {{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin|orange}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Core, +5|green}};<br>after individual battle:<br> {{RewardIcon|4h Soul Red}}{{Retext|Soul of Croc General|red}},<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +100}};<br> Wish Pond:<br> {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +50k}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Beast Moon, +1}}
|-
|37
|Guard
|
|610,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Fang, +6|green}}
|-
|38
|Guard
|
|320,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Core, +5|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|39
|Ironball Thrower
|Ironball Thrower
|640,000
|Pay 500 {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}} to get rewards
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Core, +5|green}};<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Maglev Iron Ball|green}}
|-
|40
|Guard
|
|650,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T2 Pawson Whisker, +6|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|41
|Laborer
|Mine Pit
|620,000
|Mining takes 4h to give rewards; requires 20 T1+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Core, +6|blue}};<br>After mining:<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Tool Chest, +240}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Ancient Coin, +120}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Missile Box, +1}}
|-
|42
|Engineer
|
|660,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Whisker, +6|blue}}
|-
|43
|Engineer
|
|680,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Fang, +6|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|44
|Bear General
|Power Hub
|690,000
|Bear General: ATK 16,082, DEF 10,328, HP 168,629, RUSH requires AFFCT 34,900;<br>After individual battle Power Hub requires 1 {{RewardIconWithText|Energy Core (Koryeon Domain)}} (Beat Tile 59)
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Core, +6|blue}};<br>after individual battle:<br> {{RewardIcon|8h Soul Red}} {{Retext|Soul of Bear General|red}},<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Koryeon Treasure Map, +100}};<br> Power Hub:<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Beast Moon, +1}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|45
|Engineer
|Robotic Arm
|750,000
|Need Rumbo avatar
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Whisker, +6|blue}};<br> afterwards {{RewardIconWithLink|Minie Ball|blue}} Fragment +10
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|46
|Guard
|Material Warehouse
|760,000
|Empty the warehouse!
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Fang, +6|blue}};<br> afterwards {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Demon God Gear, +3|blue}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Demon God Bearing, +3|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|47
|Engineer
|Robotic Arm
|700,000
|Need Gvent Guru Avatar
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Core, +6|blue}};<br> afterwards {{RewardIconWithLink|Lewis Chessmen|blue}} Fragment +10
|-
|48
|Guard
|
|770,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Whisker, +6|blue}}
|-
|49
|Guard
|
|720,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Fang, +6|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|50
|Guard
|Material Warehouse
|730,000
|Empty the warehouse!
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Core, +6|blue}};<br>afterwards {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Demon God Prism, +3|blue}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Demon God Chip, +3|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|51
|Engineer
|Robotic Arm
|740,000
|Need Tombstone Carrier Avatar
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Whisker, +6|blue}};<br>afterwards {{RewardIconWithLink|Chinchorro Mummy|purple}} Fragment +20
|-
|52
|Engineer
|
|800,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Fang, +6|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|53
|Engineer
|
|790,000
|Need Exterminator Avatar
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Core, +6|blue}};<br>afterwards {{RewardIconWithLink|SkyWeb Hub|orange}} Fragment +40
|-
|54
|Guard
|
|810,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Whisker, +6|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|55
|Laborer
|Mine Pit
|670,000
|Mining takes 4 hours to give rewards; requires 20 T1+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Whisker, +6|blue}};<br> After mining:<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Fungus Chest, +240}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Green Reagent, +80|green}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Missile Box, +1}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|56
|Laborer
|Mine Pit
|710,000
|Mining takes 4 hours to give rewards; requires 20 T1+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Fang, +6|blue}}; <br>{{RewardIconWithText|Toner, +96}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +80}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Missile Box, +1}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|57
|Laborer
|Mine Pit
|780,000
|Mining takes 8 hours to give rewards; requires 20 T1+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Core, +6|blue}}; <br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Chest, +240}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Missile Box, +1}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Beast Moon, +1}}
|-
|58
|Guard
|
|820,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Fang, +6|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|59
|Baboon General
|
|900,000
|Take the {{RewardIconWithText|Energy Core (Koryeon Domain)}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Core, +6|blue}}; <br>afterwards {{RewardIconWithText|Energy Core (Koryeon Domain)}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Beast Moon}}
|-
|60
|Guard
|
|910,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Whisker, +6|blue}}
|-
|61
|Engineer
|Immersive Solo Training Pod
|920,000
|Complete 10 Trials; per trial {{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +40}}, <br>last trial: {{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +80}} and Minigame: Unknown Game Cartridge
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Fang, +6|blue}}; <br>Total reward: {{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +440}},<br> Minigame: Unknown Game Cartridge
|-
|62
|Engineer
|
|930,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Core, +6|blue}}
|-
|63
|Guard
|
|940,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Whisker, +6|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|64
|Exterminator
|Operation Console
|950,000
|Requires Mecha Frm Tier 4
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Fang, +6|blue}}; <br>afterwards {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Rebel Polyster, +3|blue}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Rebel Radio, +3|blue}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Rebel Lens, +3|blue}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Rebel Deck Plate, +3|blue}}
|-
|65
|Guard
|
|960,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Core, +6|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|66
|Gorilla General
|A Set of Keys
|830,000
|Gorilla General: ATK 18,611, DEF 11,952, HP 184,083, RUSH requires AFFCT 37,700; after individual battle: Take the keys to open the Prison Cells
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Whisker, +6|blue}}; <br>after individual battle:<br> {{RewardIcon|8h Soul Red}} {{Retext|Soul of Gorilla General|red}},<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Chest, +100}};<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Prison Cell Key, +5}}
|-
|67
|Prison Guard
|Prison Cell -> King Dangun
|840,000
|Requires 1 {{RewardIconWithText|Prison Cell Key}}<br>King Dangun: ATK 17,189, DEF 14,193, HP 110,674, RUSH requires AFFCT 36,500
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Fang, +6|blue}};<br> after individual battle:<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Beast Moon, +1}}
|-
|68
|Prison Guard
|Prison Cell -> Rotten Corpse
|860,000
|Requires 1 {{RewardIconWithText|Prison Cell Key}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Core, +6|blue}};<br>Rotten Corpse: {{RewardIconWithLink|Tool Chest, +100}},<br> {{RewardIcon|4h Soul Red}}{{Retext|Soul of Rocket Laccon|red}}
|-
|69
|Prison Guard
|Prison Cell -> Traveler 1035
|870,000
|Requires 1 {{RewardIconWithText|Prison Cell Key}}<br>Free the traveler
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Whisker, +6|blue}};<br> afterwards {{RewardIconWithText|Password Note}} (2117):<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +3}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +20k}}
|-
|70
|Prison Guard
|Prison Cell -> Rotten Corpse
|880,000
|Requires 1 {{RewardIconWithText|Prison Cell Key}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Fang, +6|blue}};<br> Rotten Corpse: {{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +30}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Soldier Manual}},<br> {{RewardIcon|4h Soul Red}}{{Retext|Soul of Starry Baron|red}}
|-
|71
|Prison Guard
|Prison Cell -> Peter Jr.
|890,000
|Requires 1 {{RewardIconWithText|Prison Cell Key}}<br>Peter Jr.: ATK 21,009, DEF 9,637, HP 374,190, RUSH requires 40,100 AFFCT
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Core, +6|blue}};<br>after individual battle:<br> {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +600}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply, +50|yellow}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|72
|Laborer
|Mine Pit
|850,000
|Mining takes 8 hours to give rewards; requires 20 T1 minions
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Whisker, +6|blue}};<br> after mining:{{RewardIconWithLink|Oversized Meatball|green}} {{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Chest, +240}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Missile Box, +1}},<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Orb, +1}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|73
|Guard
|Sign
|970,000
|Split the sign
|{{RewardIconWithText|T4 Pawson Whisker, +8|purple}};<br> afterwards {{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +500}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|74
|Guard
|Fallen Satellite
|980,000
|Search the satelite for rewards
|{{RewardIconWithText|T4 Pawson Fang, +8|purple}}, afterwards {{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +6h}},<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Beast Moon, +1}}
|-
|75
|Guard
|
|1,060,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T4 Pawson Core, +8|purple}}
|-
|76
|Guard Chorister
|
|1,080,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T4 Pawson Whisker, +8|purple}}
|-
|77
|Guard
|
|990,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T4 Pawson Fang, +8|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|78
|Engineer
|Crashed Traveler Ship
|1,100,000
|Requires Awakened {{RewardIconWithLink|Traveler Manual|blue}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|T4 Pawson Core, +8|purple}}
|-
|79
|Guard
|
|1,120,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T4 Pawson Whisker, +8|purple}}
|-
|80
|Guard
|
|1,000,000
|Power 11,326, Number 120
|{{RewardIconWithText|T4 Pawson Fang, +8|purple}}
|-
|81
|Guard
|
|1,040,000
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|T4 Pawson Core, +8|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|82
|Laborer
|Mine Pit
|1,020,000
|Mining takes 10 hours to give rewards
|{{RewardIconWithText|T3 Pawson Fang, +8|blue}},<br> after mining:<br> {{RewardIconWithText|Missile Box, +1}},<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Master Scroll, +40|orange}},<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Novice Scroll, +90|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|83
|Pawson's R Hand
|Broken Pawson's R Hand
|1,140,000
|Clean up the battlefield after fight for rewards
|{{RewardIconWithText|Beast Moon, +1}};<br> Cleanup:<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +100}},<br> Cat Food +50
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|84
|Pawson's L Hand
|Seven-jeweled Pagoda
|1,160,000
|Clear 7 trials to get all rewards<br>Per trial: {{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Chest, +50}},<br> Last trial: {{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Chest, +300}} and {{RewardIconWithLink|Oversized Meatball|green}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Beast Moon, +1}};<br> total reward:<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Chest, +600}}, <br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Oversized Meatball|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|85
|Pawson
|Pawson's Broken Helmet
|1,180,000
|Pawson: ATK 25,000, DEF 16,000, HP 2,000,000, RUSH requires AFFCT 44,000
|{{RewardIconWithText|Beast Moon, +1}};<br> after individual fierce boss battle:<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Pawson's Head|green}}
|}

== Moon Shop ==

{| class="wikitable"
!Item !!Cost
|-
|{{Retext|T3 Pawson Whisker|blue}} +50
|{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}
|-
|{{Retext|T3 Pawson Fang|blue}} +50
|{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}
|-
|{{Retext|T3 Pawson Core|blue}} +50
|{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +100k}}
|{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +1.5k}}
|{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Chest, +600}}
|{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithGearlink|orange|Material|Crystal of Will}}
|{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}
|-
|After Domain is 100%<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Nebula Detector}}
|{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Beast Moon}}
|}

[[Category:Koryeon_Domain]]
